other_observers: Andrew Spencer, Joey Kellner, Glenn Walbek, Mark Peterson, Duane Nelson; We all found it together, Andrew spotted it, and I identifed it.
description: Well, this bird was far. The photos will show the size being much smaller and thinner then the nearby Double-crested Cormorant. The neck was long and the tail was long.Behaviors: Sitting on dead stump in the water.Call: nonePlumage: unknown very far away
photographer: Photographer: Brandon Percival, Brandon Percival, Brandon Percival
